race.comment: I BELIEVE I BELONG (10) made significant progress last start when second-up from a spell, making good late ground to get up for third over 1600m at Seymour. Open to plenty of improvement at the third run back and an extra 400m should hold no fears. Looks the one in a race with a few query runners. CRISTARIA (7) struck a very heavy track when attempting this trip for the first time a fortnight ago and she struggled. Ciaron Maher-trained filly who deserves another chance. DETERMINATO (2) made it four minor placings from five starts when he worked home well but not well enough as warm favourite over 1590m at Wodonga recently. Cherry ripe after a couple of runs back and this extra journey looks ideal. TRICKEMEZI (6) was very one-paced over this trip at Seymour last time. Lightly raced three-year-old who may have more to offer. MEDIEVAL WARRIOR (15) is fitter for two runs back from a spell and can improve.
